---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the standard, website, or tooling
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the situation or need that motivates this request. Focus on the problem, not the solution.

## What would help?

Describe what you would like to see. Include:
- What the change would look like
- Which part of ADS it would affect (standard content, schema, website, tooling)
- Who else might benefit

## Alternatives considered

Have you thought about other ways to address this? Why is this one preferable?

## Is it worth a breaking change?

If this would require a major-version bump (v2.x), explain why it's worth the disruption. Otherwise, confirm you expect it to be additive / backward-compatible.
